EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

InsufficientVaultBalance().details: Reverts when the vault does not have enough token liquidity.

InvalidAddress().details: Reverts when an address parameter is zero.

NotSavingCore().details: Reverts when a caller is not the configured SavingCore contract.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

ZeroAmount().details: Reverts when an amount parameter is zero.

params.recipient: Address that received the interest payment.

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

params.funder: Address that transferred tokens into the vault.

params.recipient: Address that received the withdrawn tokens.

params._initialFeeReceiver: Initial address that receives penalty fees.
params._token: ERC20 token address used by the vault.

fundVault(uint256).details: Caller must approve this contract before calling.

params.amount: Amount of tokens to transfer into the vault.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

payInterest(address,uint256).details: Callable only by the configured SavingCore contract.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

FeeReceiverUpdated(address,address).notice: Emitted when the fee receiver is updated.

InterestPaid(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when interest liquidity is paid to a depositor.

SavingCoreUpdated(address,address).notice: Emitted when the authorized SavingCore contract is updated.

VaultFunded(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when the vault receives funding.

VaultWithdrawn(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when the owner withdraws vault liquidity.

constructor.notice: Initializes the vault with its ERC20 token and initial penalty fee receiver.

feeReceiver().notice: Address that receives early withdrawal penalty fees.

fundVault(uint256).notice: Funds the vault with tokens from the owner.

payInterest(address,uint256).notice: Pays interest liquidity to a matured depositor.

savingCore().notice: SavingCore contract allowed to pay interest from this vault.

setFeeReceiver(address).notice: Updates the address that receives early withdrawal penalty fees.

setSavingCore(address).notice: Updates the SavingCore contract authorized to pay interest from this vault.

token().notice: ERC20 token held by the vault, expected to be USDC or MockUSDC.

withdrawVault(uint256).notice: Withdraws vault liquidity to the owner.

userdoc.notice: Holds protocol liquidity used for interest payouts and tracks the early-withdrawal fee receiver.
